summary: All features tested successfully. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend UI verified: login flow, Hive feed with posts, truncation CSS working, Honeypot pagination present, admin controls (Pin/Delete menu) visible.

minor.issue: 503 errors from image proxy service (external Discogs images) - not critical

critical_code_review_comments: CSS truncation correctly applied to album titles and artist names using inline styles (overflow:hidden, textOverflow:ellipsis, whiteSpace:nowrap)
Honeypot pagination implemented with HONEYPOT_PAGE_SIZE=24 constant and Show More button logic
Admin user kmklodnicki@gmail.com has is_admin=true and golden_hive_verified=true flags
Export endpoints working: /api/export/list returns 23 JSON export files
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data migration features verified: 1) Export endpoints at /api/export/list return list of JSON files (bingo_cards.json, records.json, users.json, etc), 2) Admin login works with is_admin=true flag visible in user object, 3) CSS truncation on feed cards verified - elements have overflow:hidden + textOverflow:ellipsis, 4) Honeypot pagination has HONEYPOT_PAGE_SIZE=24 with Show More button (not visible because only 1 listing exists currently)

honeypot_page.note: Show More button not visible due to only 1 listing (< 24 limit)
